title: Clionidae interaction pass + Battalion admin polish
content:
We pushed Clionidae further from a static specimen into a real interactive template surface. The goal was to make it easier to feel how controls, regions, and UI patterns actually behave before deciding what belongs in the baseline skeleton.

At the same time, Battalion got a small quality-of-life polish pass focused on admin flow and day-to-day use rather than major structural change.

What changed in this checkpoint:

  • Clionidae now has working sample controls for quick actions, section headers, content actions, dashboard actions, and settings actions so the template can be explored like a functioning site.
  • Clionidae also gained pastel-coded visual families and 1px debug framing so shell regions, sections, form areas, and support modules are easier to distinguish while planning future apps.
  • Battalion added favorite actions with local persistence, a favorites filter, cleaner task accordion structure with visible counts, softer emotion tinting, mood-note clearing after submit, and an automatic bounce back to login when a session expires.

This is a strong template-and-operations checkpoint: Clionidae is becoming more useful as a planning and selection surface, while Battalion keeps getting sharper in the practical admin details.
